productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Leather Black Formal Shoe
description: Look stylish in these black leather shoes from red tape. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with pants and shirts for a formal look.Upper High quality leather upper for comfort and durability Clean design for a very stylish look Elasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feet Fabric lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Outsole with straight grooved pattern on the forefoot and heel for better grip Slightly elevated heel for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyDo not store in direct sunlight
